description: Named "sales-channels.json" per the epic's file list, but the content is knowledge-engine's SalesMethods domain — HOW a sale happens (direct/channel-partner/inside-sales/...), reused verbatim from src/features/knowledge-engine/types/vocabularies.ts → SALES_METHOD_KEYS. This is deliberately NOT business-engine's SalesChannel (b2b/b2c/both — WHO a business sells to, see customer-types.json for that concept instead) and NOT a new vocabulary invented for this file — knowledge-engine's own README documents the same naming caution.
